title: 寄ってらっしゃい見てらっしゃい！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back to the academy, we run into
Nice Nature, who invites Kitasan Black and me to
a flea market in the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well? What do you think of the best bread in the
whole shopping district?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Mmm! It's delicious! And the apricot jam on top
takes it to a whole other level!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text: I know, right? It should be flying off the shelves, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Can't really sell something without people to sell
to...
choice_data_list:
Now that you mention it, there aren't many
customers around.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The whole market does feel deserted... but why?
People should be flocking here with food this
yummy on sale!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I heard there's a big event being held nearby, so
everyone must be there instead.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
This flea market is supposed to promote the
shopping district's upcoming Gratitude Festival,
but at this rate, no one will know about it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Now, now! There's no need to get so depressed!
After all, you have two very pleased customers
right in front of you, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Um... If it's all right with you, I'd like to help you
out!
choice_data_list: Do you have some kind of plan?
Do you have some kind of plan?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, and you're going to help! Oh, but first, let's
buy some extra bread and jam.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Now we've gotta spread the jam on the
bread, and...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Here, Trainer! Let's tuck in!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We've got apricot, strawberry, kiwi, and
blueberry jam! Heap on as much as you like!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
What do you wanna start with? How about some
good ol' strawberry jam?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black passes me a slice of bread slathered
with strawberry jam, so I accept it and take a bite.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: How is it?

text_block_list.name: Passerby
text_block_list.text:
That does look really tasty... Are they selling that
at an event nearby or something?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We bought them at that flea market just over
there! They've got tons of delicious food and
bargain finds for sale!

text_block_list.name: Passerby
text_block_list.text:
Wow, really? I had no idea they were doing a flea
market. Maybe we should go take a peek.
choice_data_list: We did it! We hooked in a group of customers!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let's keep up the good work and try
another location!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Mm-mmm! This kiwi jam bread really hits the spot!
I can feel all the exhaustion leaving my body!
choice_data_list: The tangy aftertaste is great too!
The tangy aftertaste is great too!

text_block_list.name: Jogger
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I suddenly feel hungry.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, go ahead and take a slice if you like! They're
selling them right over there at the flea market!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter... Murmur, murmur...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa, we're getting so many customers!
How'd you manage to pull so many people so
quickly, Kitasan?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, all we did was have some fun! Curiosity did
the rest.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Even when you're busy or in a rush somewhere, if
you hear people having fun, you naturally wanna
see what's going on, right?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You might wonder what the ruckus is about and
take a look. Once you do, you've already become
part of the festival!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
People'll inevitably get swept up in the
excitement, so all we gotta do is keep enjoying
ourselves and keep the party vibes high!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wow, just like that? We're clearly learning from
the master here.
choice_data_list:
So that's why you were acting so excited
outside!

So that's why you were acting so excited
outside!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yup! But it's thanks to the shops here that I was
able to hype things up so much!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's welcoming personalities and the care
they poured into each product are what got the
customers so excited!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You're sure laying it on thick.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
You're right, though! The shopping district's
relaxed and friendly atmosphere is our main
selling point!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text: Once the customers are here, the rest is up to us!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for all your help, you two. I have a feeling
the festival is gonna be A-OK!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Here! Have some tasty bread and jam as a
thank-you gift!
choice_data_list: A chic gift for a chic girl!
A chic gift for a chic girl!
It sure was fun attracting customers.
It sure was fun attracting customers.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Here! Have some tasty bread and jam as a
thank-you gift!
choice_data_list: A chic gift for a chic girl!
A chic gift for a chic girl!
It sure was fun attracting customers.
It sure was fun attracting customers.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Me, chic?! Hehe, that might be going a bit too
far...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Come on, you're our super stylish captain! Hold
your head high!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Aw, you guys! I'm gonna take that as a sincere
compliment, then! Haha!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Dad... I wonder if I've managed to get a tiny step
closer to being like you...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It really was! You sure know what you're talking
about, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And it's not like we didn't get anything out of it
ourselves. I mean, it was so much fun!
